feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maximum number of external user on SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone?
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are implementing SAP SF Work Zone with external user activated. We are just curious whether there is a maximum number of external user on SAP SF Work Zone

Thankyou

entry.title: custom logic between login and launchpad (IAS, Sap Build Work Zone)
entry.content:
Our company is developing an application for our dealers. Each dealer has different roles and therefore sees different tiles + an admin can give/take away roles.

After registration/login by IAS an event should be called which handles this logic. (based on an odata service in Sap).

How can this be implemented? We use the BTP with the Sap Build Work Zone and IAS. Is it possible to execute something between login and displaying the tiles?

entry.title: SF Recruiting Contract Creation using SAP BTP, SAP BPA & SF Work Zone
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm looking for insights into a scenario which I'm currently tackling with my client. As we are endeavoring to create contracts for candidates using SF Recruiting by leveraging SAP BTP, and SAP BPA, with SAP SF Work Zone for HR.

Appreciate it if you could share your knowledge & experience on the possibilities and challenges concerning this task? Specifically, I'd be keen to understand:

1. The feasible ways to integrate SAP BTP, SAP BPA, and SF Work Zone for HR for contract creation in SuccessFactors Recruiting.

2. Potential complexities or challenges that we might confront during the integration process.

3. Any solutions or workarounds that can simplify the process, improve efficiency, or mitigate probable issues.

4. How are you managing this process in your environment and with your clients?

Any examples, best practices, or personal experiences will likely be helpful. I'm also interested to learn about any additional tools or add-ons that could assist us in managing and streamlining this process.

Thank you in advance for your guidance and support!

Thanks,Pradyp

entry.title: SAP Work Zone and SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi Work Zone experts,

Just a quick question regarding Work Zone content provided by SAP systems (such as WDA or SAP GUI) where SAP Screen Personas has been installed. If the transaction or app has been modified by SAP Screen Personas will this modified content and the Personas editor appear when accessing SAP content via Work Zone (assuming the user has the appropriate authorisations)?

Thanks,

Steve

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone My Inbox Tasks not visible
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I followed the SAP Build Learning Journey "Composing and automating with SAP Build the No-Code Way"and followed the steps in chapter "Automating Processes with SAP Build Automation" to build an example Workflow Process.

In the SAP Build Work Zone Launchpad the process is executable and the "My Inbox Apps" shows that there is a new task. Therefore when the app is clicked nothing is shown inside.

Any idea what is missing? Tried several hints found in other Blogs. Authorization? We are runing the SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition.

Many thanks!

Max

2024-01-15-10-27-20-startseite.png

2024-01-15-10-28-24-meine-inbox.png

entry.title: error exposing Apps to Workzone standard via Content fedenration from S4HANA On Premise
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am facing an issue exposing some Apps (Mostly analytics) from S4HANA on Premise to Workzone Standard. This is happening with few apps only. Here important to note that I already activated all the relavant ICF / Odata services. Also the same apps are funtioning in Fiori Launchpad ( /n/ui2/flp).

Error Text: @5C\QError@ E HTTP Receive failed: IcmConnInitClientSSL: Proxy connection to https://host:443 via IP:8080 failed Business App D257F29xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx


I checked with infrastructure team, and the proxy IP is correct. also there are other apps (100+) and all of them are working fine.


Local Fiori launchpad



Workzone standard
Here App "Purchase order value ..... F1378 ) is not getting exposed.



any help / suggestions here?


Workzone - Standard with SAP IPS for content federation

entry.title: Blog Posts behavoiur: why sometimes they open in full page and sometimes in a layer window?
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you know why there's a difference in behavoiur?

I am adding a Content Widget in an already created workspace in Work Zone advanced edition and when the user tries to open it, it opens in a full page.


If I look at an old workspace created last month I see that when the user tries to open a content via the content widget it opens in a layer.

Could you please help me understanding this behaviour?

Thank you in andvance.

entry.title: Transport of Launchpad personalization data from one subaccount to another
entry.content:
Hello,

Are the users personalizations exported when transporting/exporting a Launchpad site, created in SAP build workzone from one subaccount to another?

entry.title: SAP Buildworkzone Launchpad site export
entry.content:
Hello,

When we export a Launchpad site from one subaccount to another, created in SAP Buildworkzone, are the users personalizations data also exported along with the site content?

Thanks.

entry.title: Workzone Advanced - My Workspace template
entry.content:
I know that MY Workspace is a fully personalized space, but customers still want My Workspace to be customized out of the box. What should I do? Or is there a way to use a regular workspace as a personalized space?

Please give me an idea

(If that doesn't work, im also considering methods such as RPA or expedient methods using webhooks and launchpad plugins.)

entry.title: How to change alignments of heading or text of form in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on a requirement in SAP Build Process Automation where I need to change the alignment of heading and text in SAP BPA form, I need to change the alignment of heading to the middle of the form and text should be in the right side of the form.

I am not getting any solutions to change the alignment of heading and text  in the SAP BPA form.

could you please provide me any suggestion or any blog that can help me resolve the issue.

Attaching a SAP BPA sample form screenshot for you reference.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Difficulty Adding Elements to Dialog Box in Extended Fiori Application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This regarding the extension of a standard Fiori application.

We are using Business Application Studio to extend the standard Fiori application. We have successful in made changes to the main screens using the adaptation project, however we are having difficulty in adding elements to the dialog box.

Requirement: There is a button on the main screen called "Cart," which opens up a dialog box when clicked. This dialog box and buttons are part of the standard application. Now, we would like to add a button in the dialog box, but we are unable to use the "Add Fragment" option over the dialog box.

Please let us know incase there is way to tackle this...

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Fiori / Work Zone - Themes are per the Business Units
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to have custom theming & branding as per business units of the user in SAP Fiori Launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. Going through the blogs, I understood that for Fiori Launchpad, either through implicit enhancement or shell programing, it can be achieved.

Is there any standard way, or through configuration to achieve it?

Thank you.

entry.title: Component card(UI Card) support for BTP standard workzone ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Is component card support for BTP standard workzone ?

entry.title: SAP UI5 Notification - Custom Portal
entry.content:
Hi I have developed a custom fiori portal using BTP portal services. Now I would like to add notification functionality in the LaunchPad. Is there way we can do it ?

Note : I am not using Cloud Portal Service or SAP Build Work Zone to develop launchpad.

entry.title: Custom back button not work in fiori launchpad
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Please help me, I am facing issue with back button with existing sap ui5 apps.

I have 2 Fiori elements applications:

  • app1: List report for search.
  • app2: Object page for create.

The steps to follow are: 

  • Search in List report, then click on a row to navigate to Object Page.
  • After filled in data, click save -> navigate to the List report.

At this point, if I click the back button of the Fiori launchpad in List report, it will return to the Object Page. I want to customize the back button so that clicking on it will return to Shell-home instead of Object Page.

I have tried following the instructions using ShellUIService and setBackNavigation, but it still doesn't work.

Link: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ushell.ui5service.ShellUIService%23overview

Here is my code, the _handleBackBtn function I put in the onAfterRendering event.

I already have tried using sap.ui.getCore().byId("backBtn"), jQuery("#backBtn") to get the button and then attach event attachPress, but on the Fiori launchpad, it cannot be retrieved and reports undefined, although it can still be accessed when running locally.

In my manifest file of List Report, I have add outbounds for navigate to Object Page.

The version in use is 1.120.1 for cloud only and use OData V4.

Please help me to check and if you really have any ideas. Let me know in case you need any details.

entry.title: Dynamic Date Range with timezone in UI5
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to make a dynamic date range (sap.m.DynamicDateRange) selection to use a specific timezone for time selection etc.,  is this possible?

 

 

Thanks,

Vinoth

SAPUI5

entry.title: Inactivity problem with Build Work Zone and onprem app
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have been using the Build Work Zone (cloud foundry), standard Edition. I have created one local app in the content manager with following configuration:

system: s/4hana destinantion with principal propagation

app-ui-technology: dynamic url

relative path to app: /bsp/*****/index.htm

This is one web application (not ui5) deployed at bsp repository. As I unterstand correctly, the app runs through the one iframe in browser. Despite user activity inside the app, the session timeout from Build Work Zone service will be anyway after max. 30 minutes shown. The session timeout cannot be deactivated. If there is any solution, so the activities from user inside onprem web application by BTP can be recognized?

entry.title: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Customer has his BTP accounts setup model as a common CF sub account for multiple business units with no Integration Suite but serverless runtime extension center for now.

Customer would like to start using SAP Build Portfolio (Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Work zone Standard Edition) with the above setup and has the following queries - 

1) Backend SAP systems are SAP ECC6 EHP6 on-premise and S4 Hana on-premise in AWS and currently using BTP Serverless Runtime Extension Center for OData Provisioning - can the OData services from these on-premise systems be accessible in SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Workzone via extension center? or is exposing services via CAP or RAP the only alternative solution available?

2) With this single sub account setup how can it be ensured that from a security perspective only authorized user of a particular business unit can access an application apart from authorization setup in launchpad and as well as how can other business unit developers be not allowed to access other application code base.

Regards,

Vipin.

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Title and Description not avilable for HTML5 Apps in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am setting up SAP Build work zone using a trial account in BTP.After updating the HTML5 Apps in Channel manager the Title and Description is missing for all the items sourced through this channel in the content manager.
